scripts.prebackend: powershell -NoProfile -ExecutionPolicy Bypass -Command "$conn=Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort 8083 -State Listen -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; if($conn){$conn | ForEach-Object { Stop-Process -Id $_.OwningProcess -Force -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue }}; exit 0"
scripts.prebackend:verbose: powershell -NoProfile -ExecutionPolicy Bypass -Command "$conn=Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort 8083 -State Listen -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; if($conn){$conn | ForEach-Object { Stop-Process -Id $_.OwningProcess -Force -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue }}; exit 0"
scripts.prebackend:mysql: powershell -NoProfile -ExecutionPolicy Bypass -Command "$conn=Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort 8083 -State Listen -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; if($conn){$conn | ForEach-Object { Stop-Process -Id $_.OwningProcess -Force -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue }}; exit 0"
